query_normalized: predicting glass transition temperature from compositional descriptors with explainable boosting machines materials science
rationale: The paper is rejected because it is off-domain entirely (biology vs. materials science) and addresses a distinct construct (general ML validation guidelines) rather than the specific mechanism of predicting glass transition temperature or the use of Explainable Boosting Machines in materials science.
